zh.lifeSummary: 當Juhel de Mayenne I於0945年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延時，他的父親Geoffrey Juhel de Mayenne I30歲，母親Etinette von Dol30歲。他於0963年與Etiennette De Dol結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1017年享年72歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Juhel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Slovenian Kuhelj: nickname or occupational name from dialect kuhelj, denoting a kind of doughnut, or directly from kuhati ‘to cook’ (see Kuhar ).

variants.name: Kuhar
meanings: ‘boy, son; prince’; a byname of the beautiful youth Skanda, son of Shiva.

en.lifeSummary: When Juhel de Mayenne I was born in 0945, in Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Geoffrey Juhel de Mayenne I, was 30 and his mother, Etinette von Dol, was 30. He married Etiennette De Dol in 0963. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1017, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juhel de Mayenne I est né en 0945, à Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Geoffrey Juhel de Mayenne I, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Etinette von Dol, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Etiennette De Dol en 0963. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1017, à l’âge de 72 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Juhel de Mayenne Iが0945年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンで生まれた時，父Geoffrey Juhel de Mayenne Iは30歳，母Etinette von Dolは30歳であった。0963年にEtiennette De Dolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1017年に72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Juhel de Mayenne I(이)가 0945년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey Juhel de Mayenne I(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Etinette von Dol(은)는 30세였다. 그는 0963년 Etiennette De Dol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1017년 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juhel de Mayenne I родился в 0945 г. в местности меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Geoffrey Juhel de Mayenne I было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Etinette von Dol, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Etiennette De Dol в 0963 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1017 г. в возрасте 72 лет.
